label: Floor f01 Gateway
info: Bridges CoAP rooms r01__01..r01__10 onto HiveMQ and translates MQTT commands into CoAP PUTs. Publishes a 60s floor summary. Degrades to an offline-autonomy subflow when HiveMQ is unreachable.

name: route by room protocol
repackage ACK → response
observe 10 CoAP telemetry URIs
func:
// At deploy time, the render script replaces this comment with 10 links to coap-obs-* nodes.
return msg;

name: republish telemetry to MQTT
compute floor averages
offline autonomy: local lighting rules
